title: Refine-Seed Continuation
hypothesis: A bounded vol-inverse refinement branch can test whether the broad momentum family still has a lighter-weight fallback after the defensive beta-aware continuation runs.
why_different_from_retired: The retired broad momentum path did not run this exact vol-inverse refinement branch under governed family approval, and it changes the weighting engine without reopening the already retired risk-sector queue head.

This branch is intentionally weaker than the beta-defensive continuation, but it remains materially different from the exhausted controls and provides one bounded final refinement before future family invention work.
success_criteria: The refine seed must pass the existing validation, holdout, and walk-forward promotion policy before it can move toward paper-trade preparation.
If it fails, it should still make it obvious whether lightweight broad-momentum refinement deserves any future backlog space.

stop_conditions.when: The refine seed passes the existing promotion policy and remains acceptable for downstream paper-trading preparation.
The refine seed records a terminal promotion decision and still fails the policy, especially on validation, holdout, or walk-forward thresholds.

bootstrap.objective: Run the remaining repo-defined broad momentum refinement branch after the beta-defensive continuation, while keeping it explicitly lower priority than materially different robustness hypotheses.
bootstrap.branch_rationale: The refine seed is still a bounded repo-backed follow-up that has not been executed in the current queued path. It is weaker than the beta-defensive branch because it is still a local momentum-family adjustment, but it remains a more credible fallback than reopening retired work.
positive_hypotheses: Switching from beta-vol-inverse to vol-inverse weighting is a distinct enough basket-construction change to justify one bounded queued attempt.
The refine seed keeps the same broad momentum horizon and turnover envelope, so it is operationally compatible with the existing runtime and promotion tooling.

seed_stack.label: Broad beta control
seed_stack.rationale: Reference broad candidate family before the defensive and refinement follow-ups.

seed_stack.label: Beta-defensive seed
seed_stack.rationale: Higher-priority materially different robustness branch that should run before the refine fallback.

seed_stack.label: Refine seed
seed_stack.rationale: Fallback broad-family refinement using vol-inverse weighting rather than beta-vol-inverse.

campaign_path.label: Refine Seed
campaign_path.purpose: Execute the last credible repo-defined broad momentum fallback before any future family creation workflow.
